scripts.sync-docs: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.copyFileSync('../../ai.txt', 'public/ai.txt'); fs.copyFileSync('../../llms.txt', 'public/llms.txt'); fs.copyFileSync('../../llms-full.txt', 'public/llms-full.txt'); try { if (fs.existsSync('public/swazz-extension.zip')) fs.unlinkSync('public/swazz-extension.zip'); require('child_process').execSync('zip -r web/public/swazz-extension.zip extension', { cwd: '..' }); } catch(e) { console.error('Failed to zip extension:', e); }"
